commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=f085cd7d8a8bf30be637d268588a816daa390a5f)
commands.review_summary:
The PR reduces stacked provider switcher row heights for 3-row and 4-row layouts and adds a bounds check test for the switcher.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection plus the related screenshot give a clear path: enable Merge Icons with many providers so the switcher stacks into several rows. I did not run the app bundle in this read-only review, so this is source-reproducible rather than live-reproduced.
commands.review_followup: Needs contributor real UI proof plus a maintainer-visible decision or patch update for compact row fitting before merge.

target.title: Provider switcher: compact multi-row layout
target.body:
Fixes/follows up #1082.

Summary:
- Reduces vertical crowding in the merged provider switcher when many providers are enabled.
- Adds compact row heights only for stacked multi-row layouts:
  - 3 rows: 40pt → 36pt
  - 4+ rows: 40pt → 34pt
- Keeps single-row and two-row behavior unchanged.
- Does not add NSScrollView.
- Does not change hitTest, acceptsFirstMouse, mouseDown, or mouseUp.
- Preserves provider ordering and click behavior.
- UI-only: no provider fetching, billing, quota, parsing, ProviderCostSnapshot, or usage snapshot changes.

Validation:
- swift test --filter StatusMenuSwitcher
- swift test --filter MenuCard
- make check
- git diff --check
target.author: yuxin-qiao

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
